stemHtml: Which statement is correct for an aircraft conducting an approach into Stuttgart if its VNAV capability is unavailable and only LNAV can be used?

options.a: It will follow a 3D non-precision flight with guidance by ground augmentation.
options.b: It will follow a 2D non-precision flight WITHOUT vertical guidance provided by on-board instruments.
options.c: It will follow a 3D non-precision flight WITHOUT vertical guidance provided by on-board instruments.
options.d: It will follow a 2D non-precision flight with guidance by ground augmentation.
